meta.title: Fiisaha Ardayda UK 2026 — Hagida Dalka
meta.description: Hagida wax-ku-oolka ah ee fiisaha ardayda UK oo leh xogta diiwaangelinta dalka iyo aqoonsiga April 2026.

hero.title: Fiisaha Ardayda UK
hero.sub: Fiisaha ardayda UK waa mid ka mid ah jidadka sharciga ah ee ugu sahlan Boqortooyada Midowday. Raadi dalkaaga hoose si aad u hesho xaaladda gaar ee ku saabsan adiga.

solicitorTitle: Raadi Gargaarka Sharciga ee Fiisaha Ardayda
